task_completion.description: Verify that the merged PCAP file was created at the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands (e.g., 'mergecap', 'tshark') or Wireshark GUI actions saving a file named 'merged_traffic.pcapng' in '/home/ga/Documents/captures/'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the summary report was created with the correct format keys.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor, 'echo', or 'cat' command showing 'merge_report.txt' in '/home/ga/Documents/captures/' containing the exact keys: 'Total Packets:', 'Protocols:', 'First Packet:', and 'Last Packet:'.

task_completion.description: Verify the total packet count in the report.
Verify the protocols listed in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Protocols:' line in the report must include at least 'DNS' and 'HTTP' (case-insensitive, comma-separated).

task_completion.description: Verify the first packet timestamp in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'First Packet:' line must show a date of '2004-05-13' and a time around '06:17:07'.

task_completion.description: Verify the last packet timestamp in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Last Packet:' line must show a date of '2005-03-30' and a time around '03:52:25'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually merged the files using a proper tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the execution of 'mergecap', 'tshark', or Wireshark GUI being used to combine both 'dns.cap' and 'http.cap'. The agent should not just copy or rename a single file.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent extracted the statistics from the PCAP files rather than hallucinating them.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the execution of 'capinfos', 'tshark', or Wireshark GUI being used to read the packet counts, protocols, and timestamps from the files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The merged file should contain exactly 81 packets (43 from http.cap + 38 from dns.cap). The first packet timestamp is 2004-05-13 06:17:07 (from http.cap). The last packet timestamp is 2005-03-30 03:52:25 (from dns.cap). The protocols must include DNS and HTTP.
